snp1.6:1.2: at one time the Blessed One was staying near Sāvatthī in Jeta’s Grove, Anāthapiṇḍika’s monastery.
snp1.6:1.3:
Then a certain deva, in the far extreme of the night,
her extreme radiance lighting up the entirety of Jeta’s Grove, went to the Blessed One.
On arrival, having bowed down to him, she stood to one side.
snp1.6:1.4: As she was standing there, she addressed him with a verse:
snp1.6:2.3: having come to question the Blessed One:
snp1.6:2.4:
What is the way leading to decline?
The Buddha:
snp1.6:3.1: Easily known is the one of good prospects;
snp1.6:3.2: easily known, the one in decline.
snp1.6:3.3: The one of good prospects loves the Dhamma,
snp1.6:3.4:
the one in decline detests it.
The deva:
snp1.6:4.1: We know, indeed, that that is so.
snp1.6:4.2: That’s the first one in decline.
snp1.6:4.3: May the Blessed One tell the second:
snp1.6:4.4:
What is the way leading to decline?
The Buddha:
snp1.6:5.1: The wicked are dear to him,
snp1.6:5.2: the good he doesn’t hold dear.
snp1.6:5.3: He approves of the ideas of the wicked:
snp1.6:5.4:
That is the way leading to decline.
The deva:
snp1.6:6.1: We know, indeed, that that is so.
snp1.6:6.2: That’s the second one in decline.
snp1.6:6.3: May the Blessed One tell the third:
snp1.6:6.4:
What is the way leading to decline?
The Buddha:
snp1.6:7.1: Prone to sleep, prone to company,
snp1.6:7.4:
That is the way leading to decline.
The deva:
snp1.6:8.1: We know, indeed, that that is so.
snp1.6:8.2: That’s the third one in decline.
snp1.6:8.3: May the Blessed One tell the fourth:
snp1.6:8.4:
What is the way leading to decline?
The Buddha:
snp1.6:9.4:
That is the way leading to decline.
The deva:
snp1.6:10.1: We know, indeed, that that is so.
snp1.6:10.2: That’s the fourth one in decline.
snp1.6:10.3: May the Blessed One tell the fifth:
snp1.6:10.4:
What is the way leading to decline?
The Buddha:
snp1.6:11.4:
That is the way leading to decline.
The deva:
snp1.6:12.1: We know, indeed, that that is so.
snp1.6:12.2: That’s the fifth one in decline.
snp1.6:12.3: May the Blessed One tell the sixth:
snp1.6:12.4:
What is the way leading to decline?
The Buddha:
snp1.6:13.4:
That is the way leading to decline.
The deva:
snp1.6:14.1: We know, indeed, that that is so.
snp1.6:14.2: That’s the sixth one in decline.
snp1.6:14.3: May the Blessed One tell the seventh:
snp1.6:14.4:
What is the way leading to decline?
The Buddha:
snp1.6:15.1: The man proud of his birth, proud of his wealth,
snp1.6:15.4:
That is the way leading to decline.
The deva:
snp1.6:16.1: We know, indeed, that that is so.
snp1.6:16.2: That’s the seventh one in decline.
snp1.6:16.3: May the Blessed One tell the eighth:
snp1.6:16.4:
What is the way leading to decline?
The Buddha:
snp1.6:17.1: The man debauched with women, debauched in drink,
snp1.6:17.4:
That is the way leading to decline.
The deva:
snp1.6:18.1: We know, indeed, that that is so.
snp1.6:18.2: That’s the eighth one in decline.
snp1.6:18.3: May the Blessed One tell the ninth:
snp1.6:18.4:
What is the way leading to decline?
The Buddha:
snp1.6:19.1: One uncontent with his own wives,
snp1.6:19.4:
That is the way leading to decline.
The deva:
snp1.6:20.1: We know, indeed, that that is so.
snp1.6:20.2: That’s the ninth one in decline.
snp1.6:20.3: May the Blessed One tell the tenth:
snp1.6:20.4:
What is the way leading to decline?
The Buddha:
snp1.6:21.2: a man takes a young woman with timbara-fruit breasts,
snp1.6:21.3: and, jealous of her, doesn’t sleep:
snp1.6:21.4:
That is the way leading to decline.
The deva:
snp1.6:22.1: We know, indeed, that that is so.
snp1.6:22.2: That’s the tenth one in decline.
snp1.6:22.3: May the Blessed One tell the eleventh:
snp1.6:22.4:
What is the way leading to decline?
The Buddha:
snp1.6:23.2: a woman given to drink & squandering
snp1.6:23.3: or a man of that sort:
snp1.6:23.4:
That is the way leading to decline.
The deva:
snp1.6:24.1: We know, indeed, that that is so.
snp1.6:24.2: That’s the eleventh one in decline.
snp1.6:24.3: May the Blessed One tell the twelfth:
snp1.6:24.4:
What is the way leading to decline?
The Buddha:
snp1.6:25.1: One of meager means but great craving,
snp1.6:25.4: That is the way leading to decline.
snp1.6:26.1: Contemplating these ones in decline in the world,
